name: PATH  BALL
short_description: In "PATH BALL" control the ball to reach the dots and solve puzzles. Collect fragments of paintings to complete the levels. Develops logic, attention and the ability to predict. Perfect for an evening break with relaxing music.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of "PATH BALL", where you become a master of ball control in a complex maze! Your task is to guide the ball through many points using physical laws and your ingenuity.

Having launched the ball, you must accurately calculate its trajectory so that it, reflecting off the walls, reaches the desired points. There will be various obstacles and puzzles on your way, which will require you to be attentive and be able to foresee the consequences of your actions.

But that's not all! The game also contains puzzle elements: fragments of paintings by great masters scattered across the levels are waiting to be put together. Having collected the whole picture, you will open access to new, more complex stages.

Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of peace with pleasant music and beautiful visual style. The game is ideal for those who like to relax after a hard day, as well as for those who are looking for a challenge to their intelligence.

Develop your logical thinking skills, improve your attention and train your ability to predict the development of events. Immerse yourself in an exciting

The world of "PATH BALL" and enjoy every moment!

The game also has :

unique achievements

leaderboard

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
